projects.name: Melody Institute
description: There are a total of four pages. On the Homepage, you can see a hero section, popular courses section, popular instructors section, and reviews section. Users can select and enroll in any course.
Admin can make someone an instructor and approve and reject instructor courses with feedback.
Instructors add classes, see classes, see approved classes, and see rejected classes with feedback.

projects.name: Books Finder
description: MERN stack project. Different role users can do many different things. Such as add to cart, enroll and payment, add class, update class, delete class, admin can approve and reject class with feedback.
Users can see classes, instructors, seat availability, and ratings while admins moderate submitted classes with review feedback.
Designed reusable dashboards for student, instructor, and admin workflows with RTK Query-based data fetching.

projects.name: CoSketch
description: Real-time collaborative whiteboard with low-latency synchronization for multi-user drawing sessions.
Built shape tools, selection, and eraser mechanics with deterministic conflict handling.
Containerized frontend, API, and websocket services with Docker Compose for predictable local/prod parity.

projects.name: Audora
description: WebRTC recording platform with custom signaling and robust session orchestration.
Designed role-based studio flows for hosts, guests, and post-session asset export.
Implemented operational monitoring and fallback handling for unstable network paths.

projects.name: Coming Soon
description: A placeholder slot reserved for the next production project currently in progress.
